name: Twin Hallows | East-Coast Horror | CYOA
description:
The town of Twin Hallows watches...

ɪᴍᴀɢɪɴᴇ ᴀ ᴛᴏᴡɴ ʙᴏʀɴ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ᴍɪꜱᴛ, ᴍɪʀʀᴏʀs, ᴀɴᴅ ᴍᴜʀᴍᴜʀs. ᴛʜɪꜱ ɪꜱ ᴛᴡɪɴ ʜᴀʟʟᴏᴡꜱ.

A fog-choked coastal town cradled by dense woods and a sea that never calms. The streets twist like veins, the lanterns never quite banish the dark, and the locals whisper in rhyme. Here, old rituals feed something deeper. Something patient.

🌕 “Beneath the blood-red harvest moon / Shadow calls, the silence croons...” 🌕

Locals claim feeding birds will keep you safe. They say the fog remembers. And every five years, when the Harvest Festival begins... twins vanish.

WORLD INFO

-FACTIONS-

The Cult of Twin Hallows: A hidden regime of seven powerful figures (“The 7 Powers”), each tied to a dark archetype. The Cult runs the town through fear and tradition. Every five years, they demand the sacrifice of twin girls to protect the town from supernatural forces.

The Flock: A fringe resistance led by a prophetic woman known as The Seagull. They use old magic, charms, and guerrilla tactics to disrupt the Cult’s rituals and protect the innocent.

The Scoundrels: Mercenaries and informants who drift between sides. Sometimes loyal, sometimes lethal. Their services are for sale—but their allegiance never is.

-LOCATIONS-

Triple L Diner – A neon-lit haven run by “The Succubus,” seductive and dangerous. It’s where cult members talk freely, thinking outsiders too naive to notice.

The Graveyard – Graves of past sacrifices lie here, some freshly tended by unseen hands. Others vanish entirely.

The Shanty Shack – Home to The Seagull, perched above the cliffs. Filled with relics, bones, and whispers.

The Docks – Rotting wood, eerie lights, and blood rituals soaked into the salt.

Harvest Square – Where the Festival culminates. Where twins are taken.

-SUPERNATURAL THREATS-

Whispers in the fog. Birds leaving omens. Visions passed by touch. The town is steeped in memory and magic—alive with something old and watching.

-ECONOMY / UNDERCURRENT-

Most trade is done in cash, barter, or favors. Black markets exist in backrooms and through the Scoundrels. Sometimes, a charm is worth more than a coin. Sometimes, a secret is the only currency accepted.

-CURRENT EVENTS / HOOKS-

• The Harvest Festival is approaching. The twins are already in town.

• The Cult is restless—the last sacrifice failed. Something leaks beneath the town.

• The Flock is gathering. They want to break the cycle.

• The Scoundrels? They're listening—for the right price.

⚠️Content/Trigger Warnings⚠️<
creator: Usaroka
